title: Assertion `j>=pLoop->u.btree.nEq || (pLoop->aLTerm[j]==0)==(j<pLoop->nSkip)' failed.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR, value DOUBLE, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Alice', 10.5), ('Bob', 20.0), ('Charlie', NULL), ('David', 15.0), ('Eve', 25.0);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_unique ON test_table (name, value);
SELECT DISTINCT id, name, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND value > 10 AND name LIKE 'A%';
UPDATE test_table SET value = value + 5 WHERE name = 'Alice' AND value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Creating unique index on multiple columns with conflicting values
